creative.title: Heritage Film Festival 2019
creative.subtitle: Runners Up — Short Film Competition
creative.description: Two people poles apart are in a live-in-relationship. Their youthful heart is constantly struggling to make their relationship stable until a certain misunderstanding creates an everlasting destruction. JANAM: A Quest for Love also got nominated in Ecstasy Film Festival.
